keywords.label: else
keywords.documentation: Alternative branch of an if statement.

keywords.label: switch
keywords.documentation: Multi-way branch based on integral value.

keywords.label: case
keywords.documentation: A single branch inside a switch.

keywords.label: break
keywords.documentation: Exit the innermost loop or switch.

keywords.label: continue
keywords.documentation: Skip the rest of the current iteration.

keywords.label: void
keywords.documentation: Empty type or absence of return value.

keywords.label: decltype
keywords.documentation: Yields the declared type of an expression.

keywords.label: volatile
keywords.documentation: Indicates that a variable may be modified externally.

keywords.label: static
keywords.documentation: Internal linkage or persistent local variable.

keywords.label: register
keywords.documentation: Hint to store variable in a register (deprecated).

keywords.label: mutable
keywords.documentation: Allows modification of a class member in a const object.

keywords.label: struct
keywords.documentation: Defines a structure (class with public default access).

keywords.label: union
keywords.documentation: A type whose members share the same memory.

keywords.label: virtual
keywords.documentation: Declares a virtual function or base class.

keywords.label: override
keywords.documentation: Explicitly marks a function as overriding a virtual function.

keywords.label: sizeof
keywords.documentation: Returns the size of a type or expression.

keywords.label: alignof
keywords.documentation: Returns alignment requirement of a type.

keywords.label: typename
keywords.documentation: Declares a type parameter or qualified dependent type.

keywords.label: try
keywords.documentation: Begins a block where exceptions are caught.

keywords.label: noexcept
keywords.documentation: Specifies that a function does not throw exceptions.

keywords.label: export
keywords.documentation: Used for module exports (C++20) or template instantiation (removed).

containers.label: std::vector
containers.documentation: Dynamic array, manages contiguous memory. Fast random access, amortized O(1) push_back.

containers.label: std::string
containers.documentation: Sequence of characters, dynamic array of char.

containers.label: std::array
containers.documentation: Fixed-size array, size known at compile time. Wraps a C-style array.

containers.label: std::deque
containers.documentation: Double-ended queue. Fast insertion/removal at both ends.

containers.label: std::list
containers.documentation: Doubly-linked list. O(1) insert/erase anywhere.

containers.label: std::forward_list
containers.documentation: Singly-linked list. Forward iteration only.

containers.label: std::stack
containers.documentation: LIFO stack, typically backed by deque or vector.

containers.label: std::queue
containers.documentation: FIFO queue, typically backed by deque.

containers.label: std::priority_queue
containers.documentation: Priority queue (max-heap by default). Backed by vector.

containers.label: std::set
containers.documentation: Ordered set of unique keys, usually red-black tree. O(log n) operations.

containers.label: std::multiset
containers.documentation: Ordered set allowing duplicate keys.

containers.label: std::map
containers.documentation: Ordered map of key-value pairs, unique keys. O(log n) operations.

containers.label: std::multimap
containers.documentation: Ordered map allowing duplicate keys.

containers.label: std::unordered_set
containers.documentation: Hash set of unique keys. Average O(1) operations.

containers.label: std::unordered_multiset
containers.documentation: Hash set allowing duplicate keys.

containers.label: std::unordered_map
containers.documentation: Hash map from key to value. Average O(1) access.

containers.label: std::unordered_multimap
containers.documentation: Hash map allowing duplicate keys.

containers.label: std::bitset
containers.documentation: Fixed-size sequence of bits. Efficient bitwise operations.

containers.label: std::pair
containers.documentation: Container for two heterogeneous values.

containers.label: std::tuple
containers.documentation: Fixed-size collection of heterogeneous values.

containers.label: std::optional
containers.documentation: Wraps an optional value that may or may not be present.

containers.label: std::variant
containers.documentation: Type-safe union of a fixed set of types.

containers.label: std::any
containers.documentation: Container for single values of any copy-constructible type.

containers.label: std::string_view
containers.documentation: Non-owning read-only view of a string.

containers.label: std::unique_ptr
containers.documentation: Unique ownership smart pointer.

containers.label: std::shared_ptr
containers.documentation: Shared ownership smart pointer.

containers.label: std::weak_ptr
containers.documentation: Non-owning weak reference to a shared_ptr.

containers.label: std::begin
containers.documentation: Returns an iterator to the beginning of a container or array.

containers.label: std::end
containers.documentation: Returns an iterator to the end of a container or array.

containers.label: std::cbegin
containers.documentation: Returns a const iterator to the beginning.

containers.label: std::cend
containers.documentation: Returns a const iterator to the end.

containers.label: std::rbegin
containers.documentation: Returns a reverse iterator to the beginning of reversed container.

containers.label: std::rend
containers.documentation: Returns a reverse iterator to the end of reversed container.

containers.label: std::size
containers.documentation: Returns the size of a container or array.

containers.label: std::empty
containers.documentation: Checks if a container or array is empty.

containers.label: std::data
containers.documentation: Returns a pointer to the underlying array of a container.

algorithms.label: std::sort
algorithms.documentation: Sorts a range in ascending order (or with custom comparator). O(N log N).

algorithms.label: std::stable_sort
algorithms.documentation: Sorts preserving relative order of equal elements.

algorithms.label: std::partial_sort
algorithms.documentation: Sorts the first middle elements leaving the rest unspecified.

algorithms.label: std::nth_element
algorithms.documentation: Places the nth element in sorted position, partially orders the rest.

algorithms.label: std::binary_search
algorithms.documentation: Checks if a value exists in a sorted range. O(log N).

algorithms.label: std::lower_bound
algorithms.documentation: Finds first position where value could be inserted without breaking order.

algorithms.label: std::upper_bound
algorithms.documentation: Finds first position where a value greater than the given one could be inserted.

algorithms.label: std::equal_range
algorithms.documentation: Returns the subrange of elements equal to a value in a sorted range.

algorithms.label: std::merge
algorithms.documentation: Merges two sorted ranges into one sorted range.

algorithms.label: std::inplace_merge
algorithms.documentation: Merges two consecutive sorted subranges in place.

algorithms.label: std::includes
algorithms.documentation: Checks if one sorted range is a subset of another.

algorithms.label: std::set_union
algorithms.documentation: Computes the union of two sorted ranges.

algorithms.label: std::set_intersection
algorithms.documentation: Computes the intersection of two sorted ranges.

algorithms.label: std::set_difference
algorithms.documentation: Computes elements present in the first but not the second sorted range.

algorithms.label: std::set_symmetric_difference
algorithms.documentation: Computes elements in either of two sorted ranges but not both.

algorithms.label: std::is_sorted
algorithms.documentation: Checks if a range is sorted.

algorithms.label: std::is_sorted_until
algorithms.documentation: Finds the largest sorted prefix.

algorithms.label: std::next_permutation
algorithms.documentation: Generates the next lexicographical permutation of a range.

algorithms.label: std::prev_permutation
algorithms.documentation: Generates the previous lexicographical permutation.

algorithms.label: std::reverse
algorithms.documentation: Reverses the order of elements in a range.

algorithms.label: std::rotate
algorithms.documentation: Rotates elements around a middle point.

algorithms.label: std::shuffle
algorithms.documentation: Randomly reorders elements using a random generator.

algorithms.label: std::sample
algorithms.documentation: Selects n random elements from a range.

algorithms.label: std::partition
algorithms.documentation: Reorders elements so that those satisfying a predicate come first.

algorithms.label: std::stable_partition
algorithms.documentation: Partitions preserving relative order.

algorithms.label: std::is_partitioned
algorithms.documentation: Checks if the range is partitioned by a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::unique
algorithms.documentation: Removes consecutive duplicate elements.

algorithms.label: std::unique_copy
algorithms.documentation: Copies elements skipping consecutive duplicates.

algorithms.label: std::remove
algorithms.documentation: Removes elements equal to a value, preserving order of remaining.

algorithms.label: std::remove_if
algorithms.documentation: Removes elements satisfying a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::replace
algorithms.documentation: Replaces occurrences of a value with another.

algorithms.label: std::replace_if
algorithms.documentation: Replaces elements satisfying a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::fill
algorithms.documentation: Assigns a value to all elements in a range.

algorithms.label: std::fill_n
algorithms.documentation: Assigns a value to the first n elements.

algorithms.label: std::generate
algorithms.documentation: Generates values using a function and stores them in a range.

algorithms.label: std::generate_n
algorithms.documentation: Generates n values using a function.

algorithms.label: std::copy
algorithms.documentation: Copies elements from one range to another.

algorithms.label: std::copy_if
algorithms.documentation: Copies elements that satisfy a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::copy_n
algorithms.documentation: Copies exactly n elements.

algorithms.label: std::move
algorithms.documentation: Moves elements from one range to another.

algorithms.label: std::swap
algorithms.documentation: Swaps the values of two objects.

algorithms.label: std::swap_ranges
algorithms.documentation: Swaps two ranges element-wise.

algorithms.label: std::iter_swap
algorithms.documentation: Swaps the elements pointed to by two iterators.

algorithms.label: std::transform
algorithms.documentation: Applies a function to each element and stores the result.

algorithms.label: std::for_each
algorithms.documentation: Applies a function to each element in a range.

algorithms.label: std::for_each_n
algorithms.documentation: Applies a function to the first n elements.

algorithms.label: std::all_of
algorithms.documentation: Checks if all elements satisfy a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::any_of
algorithms.documentation: Checks if any element satisfies a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::none_of
algorithms.documentation: Checks if no element satisfies a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::count
algorithms.documentation: Counts elements equal to a value.

algorithms.label: std::count_if
algorithms.documentation: Counts elements satisfying a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::find
algorithms.documentation: Finds the first element equal to a value.

algorithms.label: std::find_if
algorithms.documentation: Finds the first element satisfying a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::find_if_not
algorithms.documentation: Finds the first element not satisfying a predicate.

algorithms.label: std::find_end
algorithms.documentation: Finds the last occurrence of a subsequence.

algorithms.label: std::find_first_of
algorithms.documentation: Finds the first occurrence of any element from a given set.

algorithms.label: std::adjacent_find
algorithms.documentation: Finds the first adjacent pair satisfying a criterion.

algorithms.label: std::search
algorithms.documentation: Searches for a subsequence in a range.

algorithms.label: std::search_n
algorithms.documentation: Searches for n consecutive copies of a value.

algorithms.label: std::mismatch
algorithms.documentation: Finds the first position where two ranges differ.

algorithms.label: std::equal
algorithms.documentation: Checks if two ranges are equal.

algorithms.label: std::lexicographical_compare
algorithms.documentation: Compares two ranges lexicographically.

algorithms.label: std::min
algorithms.documentation: Returns the smaller of two values.

algorithms.label: std::max
algorithms.documentation: Returns the larger of two values.

algorithms.label: std::minmax
algorithms.documentation: Returns a pair of the min and max of two values.

algorithms.label: std::min_element
algorithms.documentation: Returns an iterator to the smallest element in a range.

algorithms.label: std::max_element
algorithms.documentation: Returns an iterator to the largest element in a range.

algorithms.label: std::minmax_element
algorithms.documentation: Returns iterators to the smallest and largest elements.

algorithms.label: std::clamp
algorithms.documentation: Clamps a value between a low and a high boundary.

algorithms.label: std::accumulate
algorithms.documentation: Sums elements or applies a binary operation left-fold.

algorithms.label: std::inner_product
algorithms.documentation: Computes the inner product of two ranges.

algorithms.label: std::adjacent_difference
algorithms.documentation: Computes differences between adjacent elements.

algorithms.label: std::partial_sum
algorithms.documentation: Computes cumulative prefix sums.

algorithms.label: std::iota
algorithms.documentation: Fills a range with consecutive increments of a starting value.

math.label: std::pow
math.documentation: Power function, base raised to exponent.

math.label: std::exp
math.documentation: e raised to the given power.

math.label: std::abs
math.documentation: Absolute value (overloads for int, long, etc.).

math.label: std::fabs
math.documentation: Absolute value of a floating-point number.

math.label: std::floor
math.documentation: Rounds down to the nearest integer.

math.label: std::ceil
math.documentation: Rounds up to the nearest integer.

math.label: std::round
math.documentation: Rounds to the nearest integer, halfway cases away from zero.

math.label: std::atan2
math.documentation: Arctangent of y/x with quadrant awareness.

io.label: std::endl
io.documentation: Inserts a newline and flushes the stream.

io.label: std::getline
io.documentation: Reads a line from an input stream into a string.

io.label: std::stoll
io.documentation: Converts a string to long long.

io.label: std::to_string
io.documentation: Converts a numeric value to std::string.

io.label: std::stringstream
io.documentation: Stream for reading from/writing to strings.

io.label: std::fstream
io.documentation: File stream for reading and writing.

io.label: std::setprecision
io.documentation: Set decimal precision for floating-point output.

io.label: std::fixed
io.documentation: Use fixed-point notation for floating-point output.

cp.label: FenwickTree
cp.documentation: Fenwick tree (Binary Indexed Tree) for prefix sums and point updates.

cp.label: SegmentTree
cp.documentation: Segment tree for range queries and updates.

cp.label: SparseTable
cp.documentation: Supports O(1) range minimum queries for idempotent operations.

cp.label: BFS
cp.documentation: Breadth-first search for shortest paths in unweighted graphs.

cp.label: DFS
cp.documentation: Depth-first search for traversal and connectivity.

cp.label: Dijkstra
cp.documentation: Single-source shortest paths with non-negative weights.

cp.label: BellmanFord
cp.documentation: Single-source shortest paths, works with negative edges.

cp.label: TopologicalSort
cp.documentation: Linear ordering of vertices in a DAG.

cp.label: Tarjan
cp.documentation: Tarjan's SCC algorithm or bridge/articulation point finding.

cp.label: std::move
cp.documentation: Casts to an rvalue reference, enabling move semantics.

cp.label: std::exchange
cp.documentation: Replaces the value of an object and returns its old value.

cp.label: std::tie
cp.documentation: Creates a tuple of lvalue references for unpacking.
